en_title: Silent Hill: Townfall Gets New Trailer, Release Date at PlayStation State of Play
subtitle: 第一人称新篇章
opus_summary: 在PlayStation State of Play发布会上，《寂静岭：小镇陨落》放出全新预告，展示第一人称玩法与苏格兰小镇场景。本作并非设定在寂静岭镇，玩家将利用道具躲避怪物。游戏将于9月24日登陆PS5和PC，是科乐美重启《寂静岭》系列后的第三款作品。

paragraphs.en: During the PlayStation State of Play, a brand new trailer teased the story and gameplay of Silent Hill: Townfall .
paragraphs.cn: 在PlayStation State of Play发布会上，一支全新预告片展示了《寂静岭：小镇陨落》的故事与玩法。

paragraphs.en: Unlike most Silent Hill games, this one will be first-person and not set in the town of Silent Hill at all. Players will sneak around a spooky town in Scotland, using items like bottles to distract monsters to avoid direct conflict. Townfall isn't the first Silent Hill game, but it is the first premium title in the series to change perspectives. Hideo Kojima famously tried to take the series in a new direction with Silent Hills and utilized a first-person perspective with the game's teaser, known as PT. Unfortunately, Konami pulled the plug on it during a public break-up with Kojima. It left many craving not only a new Silent Hill game, but one that embraced a first-person POV.
paragraphs.cn: 与大多数《寂静岭》游戏不同，本作采用第一人称视角，且完全不设定在寂静岭镇。玩家将在苏格兰一座阴森小镇中潜行，利用瓶子等道具分散怪物注意力，避免正面冲突。《小镇陨落》并非系列首作，但它是系列首款改变视角的付费大作。小岛秀夫曾试图通过《寂静岭》重启项目（其试玩版名为PT）为系列开辟新方向，采用第一人称视角。遗憾的是，科乐美在与小岛秀夫公开决裂时终止了该项目。这让许多玩家不仅渴望一款新的《寂静岭》游戏，更期待一款采用第一人称视角的作品。

paragraphs.en: Silent Hill: The Short Message also utilized a first-person persecptive, but that was a short, free-to-play experience as part of Konami's efforts to revitalize Silent Hill. Despite not taking place in the titular town, Townfall will embrace the themes and aesthetics of the franchise by having the main character explore a spooky, misty town which he is mysteriously linked to. The trailer also confirmed that Silent Hill: Townfall is releasing on September 24 for PS5 and PC.
paragraphs.cn: 《寂静岭：短讯》也采用了第一人称视角，但那是一款短小精悍的免费游戏，是科乐美重振《寂静岭》系列计划的一部分。尽管故事不发生在同名小镇，《小镇陨落》仍将延续系列的主题与美学风格，主角将探索一座与他有着神秘联系的阴森雾镇。预告片还确认，《寂静岭：小镇陨落》将于9月24日登陆PS5和PC。

paragraphs.en: Silent Hill: Townfall is the third Silent Hill game since Konami revived the series a few years ago. Konami is now at the end of the slate of Silent Hill games it announced back in 2022. However, it is not the end of the publisher's plans for the horror series. Bloober Team is remaking the original Silent Hill game and Konami will likely continue to produce more games after that.
paragraphs.cn: 《寂静岭：小镇陨落》是科乐美数年前重启该系列后的第三款《寂静岭》游戏。科乐美现已接近完成2022年公布的《寂静岭》游戏阵容。然而，这并非该发行商对这款恐怖系列计划的终点。Bloober Team正在重制初代《寂静岭》，科乐美此后很可能继续推出更多游戏。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解PlayStation的后续计划，这里是2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
